task_completion.description: A central circle is created and centered exactly at the origin (0,0).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle is visible in the drawing workspace with its center point coincident with the intersection of the main horizontal and vertical axes (the origin).

task_completion.description: The central circle is dimensioned to a diameter of 38.1 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension label showing '38.1' or '38.10' is attached to the central circle.

task_completion.description: A square made of construction lines is created and dimensioned to 47.14 mm x 47.14 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A square is visible, drawn with dashed/green construction lines. Dimension labels showing '47.14' are visible for its sides, or it is constrained symmetrically with a 47.14 dimension.

task_completion.description: Four circles are placed at the corners of the construction square, each with a diameter of 5.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four circles are located at the vertices of the construction square. At least one has a dimension label of '5.0' or '5.00' (with the others constrained to be equal), or all four have '5.0' labels.
The SolveSpace property browser (usually on the left) indicates the sketch has 0 degrees of freedom (e.g., shows 'Ok' with a green background, rather than 'unconstrained').

task_completion.description: The completed sketch is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'nema23_layout.slvs', or a 'Save As' dialog box is visible showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema23_layout.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the sketch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface with toolbars, property browser, and graphical workspace being actively used, rather than a text editor writing a .slvs file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actively interacted with the drawing tools to build the layout from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progressive screenshots show the step-by-step construction of the sketch (e.g., drawing lines, adding constraints, entering dimensions) rather than just opening a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing scripts (e.g., Python) to generate the .slvs file; all modeling actions occur within the SolveSpace GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/nema23_layout.slvs'. The NEMA 23 standard dimensions to verify in the layout are: a construction square of 47.14 mm x 47.14 mm, a center bore diameter of 38.1 mm, and four corner hole diameters of 5.0 mm.
